_comment: Example CUSTOM Flux workflow override for the ACKS Classic Importer (API format). Paste into the module's 'ComfyUI workflow JSON' setting to override the built-in Flux builders. Supported placeholders: %%PROMPT%%, %%NEGATIVE%%, %%WIDTH%%, %%HEIGHT%%, %%SEED%%, %%CHECKPOINT%% (the Flux UNet filename), %%INIT_IMAGE%%. %%INIT_IMAGE%% receives the importer's labeled reference image (each area filled and captioned); feed it through VAEEncode for an img2img redraw so Flux repaints each labeled region in place. This example is a map (img2img) graph; for portraits, drop the LoadImage/ImageScale/VAEEncode chain and use an EmptyLatentImage instead. Built-in builders cover both already — use this only to customize.
